FNV NATIVE RENDER-STATE FOG COLOR CONTRACT AUDIT

Questions:
1. Which vtable entry is NiDX9RenderState::SetRenderState, and how does it update the render-state cache?
2. Does D3DRS_FOGCOLOR update NiDX9RenderState +0x8C/+0x90/+0x94, or only the packed D3D render-state cache?
3. Is final renderer fog color a safer source than raw TESWeather color fields for Psycho material lighting?

Compatibility target:
Prefer a final renderer-owned fog color if this audit proves it. Fall back to unavailable constants rather than walking raw weather fields when the render-state contract is unproven.

======================================================================
D3D fog render states to check inside SetRenderState paths
======================================================================
  0x1c D3DRS_FOGENABLE          render-state cache slot candidate +0x200
  0x22 D3DRS_FOGCOLOR           render-state cache slot candidate +0x230
  0x23 D3DRS_FOGTABLEMODE       render-state cache slot candidate +0x238
  0x24 D3DRS_FOGSTART           render-state cache slot candidate +0x240
  0x25 D3DRS_FOGEND             render-state cache slot candidate +0x248
  0x26 D3DRS_FOGDENSITY         render-state cache slot candidate +0x250
  0x30 D3DRS_RANGEFOGENABLE     render-state cache slot candidate +0x2a0

  If SetRenderState only writes +0x120 cache and D3D, Psycho can still read D3DRS_FOGCOLOR through the cache/state-block path.
  If +0x8C/+0x90/+0x94 are updated from D3DRS_FOGCOLOR, those floats are the cleaner normalized fog-color source.
